parameter.name: DL_FMM_SetupOptions
parameter.displayItems: Cube Config,Unit and Account Config, Custom Table Definition,Custom Table Assignment,UI Config,Validation Config, Approval Config,Build Model,Build Model Group,Build Model Group Sequence

parameter.name: DL_FMM_Table_Calc_Src
parameter.displayItems: Proportional Time,Allocation,Alloc Num,Alloc Den,Cube View, Map, Dim Info

parameter.name: DL_FMM_ApprConfig_Status
parameter.displayItems: Track Approval Step Changes, Track Totals Only

parameter.name: DL_FMM_ApprConfig_Type
parameter.displayItems: Track Approval Step Changes, Track Totals Only

parameter.name: DL_FMM_ApprConfigConfig
parameter.displayItems: Track Approval Step Changes, Track Totals Only

parameter.name: DL_FMM_ApprStepConfig_Status
parameter.displayItems: Track Approval Step Changes, Track Totals Only

parameter.name: DL_FMM_ApprStepConfig_Type
parameter.displayItems: Track Approval Step Changes, Track Totals Only

parameter.name: IV_FMM_ApprConfig_Name
parameter.displayItems: Track Approval Step Changes, Track Totals Only

parameter.name: BL_FMM_CubeConfigID_Table
parameter.description: Cube Settings GBL Parameter used in Unit/Acct Config, Reg Config

parameter.name: DL_FMM_ModelConfig_CalcType
parameter.displayItems: Table,Cube,BR Table to Cube,Cube to Table,Consolidate

parameter.name: DL_FMM_Src_CubeType
parameter.displayItems: Stored Cell,Dynamic Calc,Multi-Dim Alloc Numerator,Multi-Dim Alloc Denominator

parameter.name: BL_FMM_CubeConfigID_Src
parameter.description: Global Src Cube ID Param (Copy Cube, Cop

adapter.name: DA_FMM_CalcUnitConfig
adapter.sqlQuery: SELECT CubeConfigID ,CalcUnitID ,EntityMFB ,WFChannel FROM FMM_CalcUnitConfig WHERE CubeConfigID = |!BL_FMM_CubeConfigID!| AND Status <> 'Archived'

adapter.name: DA_FMM_ModelConfig
adapter.sqlQuery: SELECT ModelConfigID,Name FROM FMM_ModelConfig WHERE CubeConfigID = |!BL_FMM_CubeConfigID!|

adapter.name: DA_FMM_ModelGrps
adapter.sqlQuery: SELECT ModelGrpID,Name FROM FMM_ModelGrps WHERE CubeConfigID = |!BL_FMM_CubeConfigID!| AND Status <> 'Archived'

adapter.name: DA_FMM_Src_Calc_List
adapter.sqlQuery: SELECT CalcConfigID,Name FROM FMM_CalcConfig_Config WHERE CubeConfigID = |!BL_FMM_CubeConfigID_Src!| AND ActConfigID = |!BL_FMM_Src_Activity_ID!| AND ModelConfigID = |!BL_FMM_Src_ModelConfigID!| AND Status <> 'Archived'

component.name: btn_FMM_AcctConfig_DialogCopy
component.toolTip: Copy Full Model or Individual Calcs

component.name: btn_FMM_MenuHide
component.displayFormat: |!LV_Std_btn_Format!|, Height = 20, HorizontalAlignment = Left, IsVisible = |!IV_FMM_DispHide_MenuBtn!|, LabelPosition = Right, VerticalAlignment = Top

component.name: btn_FMM_MenuShow
component.displayFormat: |!LV_Std_btn_Format!|, Height = 20, HorizontalAlignment = Left, IsVisible = |!IV_FMM_DispShow_MenuBtn!|, LabelPosition = Right, VerticalAlignment = Top

component.name: btn_FMM_ModelCalcSrc_Delete
component.displayFormat: |!LV_Std_btn_Format!|, Height = 40, MarginBottom = 5, MarginLeft = 5, MarginRight = 5, MarginTop = 5, VerticalAlignment = Center, Width = 40

component.name: btn_FMM_ModelConfigDialog_Copy
component.toolTip: Copy Full Model or Individual Calcs
